creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Peter B, 22.10.08, 12:39h CEST:

> It's not fixed asfaik.
> I just have many things to deal with. And creating a setup enviroment to test
> these things might take some time.

OK. Please let us know if you can still reproduce the problem on an
up-to-date system. (I noticed that, in your report, you mentioned
xorg-libraries-6.9.0; XOrg 7.3 has been in the tree since September 2007.)

Regards,
Stefan
